tasks.title: Create ExchangeRate Zod schema
tasks.description:
Create the main ExchangeRate Zod schema following the Tag schema pattern. The schema represents a single exchange rate record.

Schema fields:
- id: uuid
- fromCurrency: PriceCurrencyEnumSchema (ARS, USD, BRL)
- toCurrency: PriceCurrencyEnumSchema
- rate: z.number().positive() (decimal precision)
- inverseRate: z.number().positive()
- rateType: ExchangeRateTypeEnumSchema
- source: ExchangeRateSourceEnumSchema
- isManualOverride: z.boolean()
- expiresAt: z.coerce.date().optional().nullable()
- fetchedAt: z.coerce.date()
- createdAt, updatedAt (standard audit fields)

Files to create:
- packages/schemas/src/entities/exchange-rate/exchange-rate.schema.ts
- packages/schemas/src/entities/exchange-rate/index.ts

Files to modify:
- packages/schemas/src/entities/index.ts (add export)

Test requirements:
- Unit test: valid exchange rate passes validation
- Unit test: invalid rates rejected (negative, zero)
- Unit test: invalid currency pairs rejected
- Unit test: expiresAt is optional/nullable
- Test file: packages/schemas/src/entities/exchange-rate/__tests__/exchange-rate.schema.test.ts

tasks.title: Create exchange_rates DB table schema
tasks.description:
Create the Drizzle ORM table definition for exchange_rates following the tag.dbschema.ts pattern.

Table columns:
- id: uuid primary key defaultRandom
- fromCurrency: PriceCurrencyPgEnum, not null
- toCurrency: PriceCurrencyPgEnum, not null
- rate: numeric(20, 10), not null
- inverseRate: numeric(20, 10), not null
- rateType: ExchangeRateTypePgEnum, not null
- source: ExchangeRateSourcePgEnum, not null
- isManualOverride: boolean, not null, default false
- expiresAt: timestamp with timezone, nullable
- fetchedAt: timestamp with timezone, not null
- createdAt: timestamp with timezone, defaultNow, not null
- updatedAt: timestamp with timezone, defaultNow, not null

Indexes:
- composite index on (fromCurrency, toCurrency, rateType) for lookups
- index on fetchedAt for history queries
- index on source for filtering

Files to create:
- packages/db/src/schemas/exchange-rate/exchange-rate.dbschema.ts
- packages/db/src/schemas/exchange-rate/index.ts

Files to modify:
- packages/db/src/schemas/index.ts (add export)

Test requirements:
- Unit test: verify table columns match spec
- Unit test: verify indexes exist
- Test file: packages/db/src/schemas/exchange-rate/__tests__/exchange-rate.dbschema.test.ts

tasks.title: Create ExchangeRateService basic CRUD
tasks.description:
Create the ExchangeRateService extending BaseCrudService (not BaseCrudRelatedService since exchange rates don't have related entities). Implement standard CRUD operations plus exchange-rate-specific methods.

Service methods:
- Standard CRUD: create, getById, update, softDelete, restore, search, count
- getLatestRate({ fromCurrency, toCurrency, rateType }): Get most recent rate
- getLatestRates(): Get all current rates
- createManualOverride({ fromCurrency, toCurrency, rate, rateType, expiresAt }): Create manual rate
- removeManualOverride(id): Remove a manual override

Permission hooks:
- _canCreate -> checkCanCreateExchangeRate
- _canUpdate -> checkCanUpdateExchangeRate
- _canDelete -> checkCanDeleteExchangeRate
- _canRead -> checkCanViewExchangeRate

Files to create:
- packages/service-core/src/services/exchange-rate/exchange-rate.service.ts
- packages/service-core/src/services/exchange-rate/exchange-rate.normalizers.ts

- Unit test: removeManualOverride only removes manual overrides

tasks.title: Create DolarAPI client
tasks.description:
Create an HTTP client for the DolarAPI.com service. This client fetches Argentine exchange rates (all types: oficial, blue, MEP, CCL, tarjeta, cripto) and BRL rates.

Endpoints to implement:
- GET https://dolarapi.com/v1/dolares/ -> All USD/ARS rates by type
- GET https://dolarapi.com/v1/cotizaciones/ -> All currency rates including BRL

Client features:

- Timeout handling (5 second default)
- Error handling with proper error types
- Response normalization to internal ExchangeRate format
- Rate limiting awareness

tasks.title: Create exchange rate fetcher with fallback chain
tasks.description:
Create the core rate fetcher that implements the priority/fallback chain defined in spec section 4.1:

1. Manual admin override (if set and not expired)
2. DolarAPI (for ARS-related pairs)
3. ExchangeRate-API (for international pairs)
4. Last known rate from DB (stale fallback)

Fetcher responsibilities:
- Determine which source to use based on currency pair
- Try sources in priority order, fall back on failure
- Store fetched rates in database
- Calculate and store inverse rates
- Log all fetch attempts and failures
- Track consecutive failures for admin alerting

Files to create:
- packages/service-core/src/services/exchange-rate/exchange-rate-fetcher.ts

Test requirements:
- Unit test: DolarAPI used for ARS pairs
- Unit test: ExchangeRate-API used for non-ARS pairs
- Unit test: fallback to next source on failure
- Unit test: fallback to DB on all API failures
- Unit test: manual override takes priority
- Unit test: expired manual override is skipped
- Unit test: inverse rate calculated correctly
- Unit test: consecutive failures tracked
- Test file: packages/service-core/src/services/exchange-rate/__tests__/exchange-rate-fetcher.test.ts

subtasks.title: Implement source selection logic by currency pair
Add logging for all fetch attempts
Write comprehensive tests for all paths

tasks.title: Implement exchange rate cron scheduler
tasks.description:
Implement scheduled automatic rate fetching in the API server. Use a simple interval-based approach (setInterval or a lightweight cron library).

Behavior:
- On API server startup, initialize the scheduler
- Read fetch intervals from ExchangeRateConfigService
- DolarAPI: fetch every dolarApiFetchIntervalMinutes (default 15 min)
- ExchangeRate-API: fetch every exchangeRateApiFetchIntervalHours (default 6 hours)
- Only run if enableAutoFetch is true
- Re-read config periodically to pick up changes
- Log all fetch results
- Track consecutive failures for alerting

Files to create:
- apps/api/src/cron/exchange-rate-scheduler.ts
- apps/api/src/cron/index.ts

Files to modify:
- apps/api/src/index.ts or startup file (initialize scheduler)

Test requirements:
- Unit test: scheduler starts and stops correctly
- Unit test: respects enableAutoFetch config
- Unit test: uses correct intervals from config
- Unit test: handles fetch failures without crashing
- Unit test: re-reads config on interval
- Test file: apps/api/src/cron/__tests__/exchange-rate-scheduler.test.ts

subtasks.title: Read and re-read config for intervals

tasks.title: Create exchange rates admin feature configuration
tasks.description:
Create the admin feature configuration for exchange rates following the existing admin app pattern. This sets up the feature directory, TanStack Query hooks, and shared config.

Feature structure:
- features/exchange-rates/config/exchange-rates.config.ts (route + page component exports)
- features/exchange-rates/hooks/use-exchange-rates.ts (TanStack Query hooks)
- features/exchange-rates/hooks/use-exchange-rate-config.ts
- features/exchange-rates/types.ts (admin-specific types)

Hooks to create:
- useExchangeRates(): Fetch current rates
- useExchangeRateHistory(): Fetch rate history
- useExchangeRateConfig(): Fetch config
- useUpdateExchangeRateConfig(): Mutation to update config
- useCreateManualOverride(): Mutation to create override
- useDeleteManualOverride(): Mutation to delete override
- useTriggerFetch(): Mutation to trigger fetch-now

Files to create:
- apps/admin/src/features/exchange-rates/config/exchange-rates.config.ts
- apps/admin/src/features/exchange-rates/hooks/use-exchange-rates.ts
- apps/admin/src/features/exchange-rates/hooks/use-exchange-rate-config.ts
- apps/admin/src/features/exchange-rates/types.ts

Test requirements:
- Unit test: hooks return correct data shape
- Unit test: mutations call correct endpoints
- Test file: apps/admin/src/features/exchange-rates/hooks/__tests__/use-exchange-rates.test.ts

tasks.title: Create exchange rates admin table component
tasks.description:
Create the main exchange rates table component for the admin dashboard using TanStack Table. Shows current rates with sorting, filtering, and actions.

Table columns:
- From Currency
- To Currency
- Rate
- Inverse Rate
- Rate Type
- Source (with badge: manual/dolarapi/exchangerate-api)
- Last Updated (relative time)
- Actions (delete for manual overrides)

Features:
- Column sorting
- Filter by currency pair
- Filter by source type
- Conditional delete button (only manual overrides)
- Rate staleness indicator (warning if > 1 hour old)

Files to create:
- apps/admin/src/features/exchange-rates/components/exchange-rates-table.tsx

Test requirements:
- Unit test: renders table with correct columns
- Unit test: sorting works
- Unit test: delete button shown only for manual overrides
- Unit test: staleness indicator displays correctly
- Test file: apps/admin/src/features/exchange-rates/components/__tests__/exchange-rates-table.test.tsx

tasks.title: Create manual rate override dialog form
tasks.description:
Create a dialog form for admins to set manual rate overrides. Uses shadcn UI Dialog + Form components.

Form fields:
- From Currency (select: ARS, USD, BRL)
- To Currency (select: ARS, USD, BRL, must differ from 'from')
- Rate (number input, positive, with precision)
- Rate Type (select: oficial, blue, mep, ccl, tarjeta, standard)
- Expires At (optional date picker)

Validation:
- Rate must be positive
- From and To currencies must differ
- Zod validation via ExchangeRateCreateInputSchema

Files to create:
- apps/admin/src/features/exchange-rates/components/manual-override-form.tsx

Test requirements:
- Unit test: form renders all fields
- Unit test: validation rejects invalid data
- Unit test: prevents same from/to currency
- Unit test: submit calls correct mutation
- Test file: apps/admin/src/features/exchange-rates/components/__tests__/manual-override-form.test.tsx
